instruction:
You are an Expert DevOps Engineer specializing in Travis CI to GitHub Actions migrations. Migrate this Travis CI config to a COMPLETE GitHub Actions workflow.

OUTPUT RULES
- Output YAML only (no prose). Your output MUST start with "name:" and include top-level keys: name, on, jobs.
- Include at least one job with: runs-on, steps.
- Do NOT output a snippet (must not start with "- uses:" or "- run:").

CONVERSION RULES
- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.
- Map Travis lifecycle to GHA steps: before_install, install, before_script, script, after_success/failure, deploy.
- Map matrices: jdk/node_js/python/go -> strategy.matrix; allow_failures -> continue-on-error.
- Env: env.global -> env (workflow/job/step). $FOO secrets -> ${{ secrets.FOO }}.
- Caches: cache: directories -> actions/cache@v4 with stable keys.
- Services/addons: services (dbs) -> jobs.<job>.services; addons.apt -> apt-get steps.
- Docker/Compose: preserve docker build/push and docker-compose up/down; keep wait loops verbatim.
- Triggers: preserve original branch/tag names; do not invent "main" or "master".
- Use modern actions: actions/checkout@v4; actions/setup-java@v4 (distribution: temurin), setup-node@v4, setup-python@v5, setup-go@v5.
- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source (Buildx, login actions, GHCR, Sonar, custom email actions). If no 1:1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:" comment.
- Prefer compact flow style for simple event lists. Use on: [push, pull_request] instead of multiline empty mappings.
- Do not leave empty event mappings.
- If branch/tag filters are required, switch to the expanded form for that event only.

input:
language: java
jdk:
  - oraclejdk8
dist: trusty
install: true
sudo: required
services:
  - docker
script: ./gradlew clean build
cache:
  directories:
    - "$HOME/.m2"
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Build with Gradle
        run: ./gradlew clean build

input:
language: java

dist: trusty

env:
  global:
    - JRE6_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-6-openjdk-amd64/jre

matrix:
  include:
    - os: linux
      jdk: oraclejdk11
    - os: linux
      jdk: oraclejdk8
    - os: linux
      jdk: openjdk7
    - os: osx
      before_install:
        - brew update
        - brew install wine ant

addons:
  apt:
    sources:
      - sourceline: 'deb https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/ubuntu/ trusty main'
        key_url: https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/winehq.key
    packages:
      - ant-optional
      - lib32ncurses5
      - lib32z1
      - openjdk-6-jdk
      - winehq-stable

before_script:
  - ant -diagnostics

script:
  - ant all
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  JRE6_HOME: /usr/lib/jvm/java-6-openjdk-amd64/jre

jobs:
  build-linux-jdk11:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Add Wine repository and install packages
        run: |
          sudo dpkg --add-architecture i386
          sudo mkdir -pm755 /etc/apt/keyrings
          sudo wget -O /etc/apt/keyrings/winehq-archive.key https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/winehq.key
          sudo wget -NP /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/ubuntu/dists/focal/winehq-focal.sources
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y ant-optional lib32ncurses5 lib32z1 openjdk-6-jdk winehq-stable
      - name: Ant diagnostics
        run: ant -diagnostics
      - name: Build
        run: ant all

  build-linux-jdk8:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Add Wine repository and install packages
        run: |
          sudo dpkg --add-architecture i386
          sudo mkdir -pm755 /etc/apt/keyrings
          sudo wget -O /etc/apt/keyrings/winehq-archive.key https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/winehq.key
          sudo wget -NP /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/ubuntu/dists/focal/winehq-focal.sources
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y ant-optional lib32ncurses5 lib32z1 openjdk-6-jdk winehq-stable
      - name: Ant diagnostics
        run: ant -diagnostics
      - name: Build
        run: ant all

  build-linux-jdk7:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 7
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '7'
      - name: Add Wine repository and install packages
        run: |
          sudo dpkg --add-architecture i386
          sudo mkdir -pm755 /etc/apt/keyrings
          sudo wget -O /etc/apt/keyrings/winehq-archive.key https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/winehq.key
          sudo wget -NP /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/ubuntu/dists/focal/winehq-focal.sources
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y ant-optional lib32ncurses5 lib32z1 openjdk-6-jdk winehq-stable
      - name: Ant diagnostics
        run: ant -diagnostics
      - name: Build
        run: ant all

  build-macos:
    runs-on: macos-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          brew update
          brew install wine-stable ant
      - name: Ant diagnostics
        run: ant -diagnostics
      - name: Build
        run: ant all

input:
if: branch = master

language: android
sudo: false

env:
  global:
  - secure: 
  - secure: 

android:
  components:
  - tools
  - build-tools-28.0.3
  - android-29

before_install:
  - yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

jobs:
  include:
  - stage: test
    script:
    - ./gradlew assembleDebug checkstyle lintDebug --stacktrace

  - stage: deploy
    if: branch = master AND type = push
    script:
    - git fetch --unshallow # Build number will be incorrect for shallow copy
    - ./gradlew publishSample --stacktrace
output:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

env:
  SECRET_1: 
  SECRET_2: 

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "tools"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;28.0.3"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
          yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches/
            ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run tests
        run: ./gradlew assembleDebug checkstyle lintDebug --stacktrace
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  deploy:
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "tools"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;28.0.3"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-29"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches/
            ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Publish sample
        run: ./gradlew publishSample --stacktrace
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

language: java
jdk: openjdk8
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2

before_install:
  - if [ ! -z "$GPG_SECRET_KEYS" ]; then echo $GPG_SECRET_KEYS | base64 --decode | $GPG_EXECUTABLE --import; fi
  - if [ ! -z "$GPG_OWNERTRUST" ]; then echo $GPG_OWNERTRUST | base64 --decode | $GPG_EXECUTABLE --import-ownertrust; fi

install: mvn install --settings .travis/settings.xml -DskipTests -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B

script:

output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Import GPG keys
        if: env.GPG_SECRET_KEYS != ''
        run: |
          if [ ! -z "${{ secrets.GPG_SECRET_KEYS }}" ]; then echo ${{ secrets.GPG_SECRET_KEYS }} | base64 --decode | gpg --import; fi
          if [ ! -z "${{ secrets.GPG_OWNERTRUST }}" ]; then echo ${{ secrets.GPG_OWNERTRUST }} | base64 --decode | gpg --import-ownertrust; fi
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: mvn install --settings .travis/settings.xml -DskipTests -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B
      - name: Deploy
        run: mvn clean deploy --settings .travis/settings.xml -DskipTests=true -B

input:
language: java
sudo: false # faster builds

jdk:
  - openjdk11
  - openjdk8

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2

install: true

script:
  - rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/org/glassfish/javax.el/3.0.1-b08
  - travis_wait 30 ./mvnw --batch-mode --no-transfer-progress clean install -DskipTests=false -DskipIntegrationTests=false -Dcheckstyle.skip=false -Drat.skip=false -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

after_failure:
  - echo "build failed!"
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['11', '8']
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Clean specific Maven artifact
        run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/org/glassfish/javax.el/3.0.1-b08
      - name: Build and test
        run: ./mvnw --batch-mode --no-transfer-progress clean install -DskipTests=false -DskipIntegrationTests=false -Dcheckstyle.skip=false -Drat.skip=false -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true
        timeout-minutes: 30
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        if: success()
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
      - name: Build failed
        if: failure()

language: c

services:
  - docker

before_install:
  - sudo apt-get update

install:
  - sudo apt-get install -qq raptor2-utils

before_script:
  - docker build -t atomgraph/processor .
  - cd http-tests
  - docker-compose up -d # run fuseki and processor containers in the background
  - while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8080 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done # wait for processor-ct to start
  - while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8081 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done # wait for processor-ct-write to start
  - while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8082 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done # wait for processor-ngt to start
  - while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8083 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done # wait for processor-ngt-write to start
  - while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8084 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done # wait for processor-custom to start
  - while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8085 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done # wait for processor-custom-write to start

script:
  - bash ./run.sh # run tests

after_script:
  - docker-compose down # shutdown fuseki and processor
  - docker-compose rm -f

notifications:
  email:
    recipients:
      - martynas@atomgraph.com

      - name: Install raptor2-utils
        run: sudo apt-get install -qq raptor2-utils
      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t atomgraph/processor .
      - name: Start Docker Compose services
        run: |
          cd http-tests
          docker-compose up -d
      - name: Wait for processor-ct to start
        run: while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8080 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done
      - name: Wait for processor-ct-write to start
        run: while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8081 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done
      - name: Wait for processor-ngt to start
        run: while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8082 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done
      - name: Wait for processor-ngt-write to start
        run: while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8083 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done
      - name: Wait for processor-custom to start

      - name: Wait for processor-custom-write to start
        run: while ! curl -w "%{http_code}\n" -s -o /dev/null http://localhost:8085 | grep "404" ; do sleep 1 ; done
      - name: Run tests

      - name: Shutdown Docker Compose services

          cd http-tests
          docker-compose down
          docker-compose rm -f
      - name: Email notification

    - stage: "build"
      name: "Windows Build"
      os: windows
      language: shell
      install:
        - choco install jdk8 -params 'installdir=c:\\java8'
        - export JAVA_HOME="c:\\java8"\\
        - export PATH="$PATH;$JAVA_HOME\\bin"
        - choco install maven -version 3.6.3

      language: java
      jdk: openjdk8
      install:
        - java -version
      script:
        - set -e
        - ./gradlew clean build codeCoverageReport --stacktrace --scan --console=plain --no-daemon
      after_success:
        - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

language: java

install: true

script:
 - sudo apt-get update
 - sudo apt-get install graphviz
 - java -version
 - ./gradlew buildCI --scan --stacktrace --info

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

jdk:
  - openjdk8

  #- oraclejdk9 OracleJDK 9 has a certificate issue with jcenter
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        java: [8, 9, 11]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}

    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

    - name: Script
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install graphviz
        java -version
        ./gradlew buildCI --scan --stacktrace --info

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

on: [push, pull_request]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:

sudo: false
jdk:
- oraclejdk8
env:

  - secure: "" # CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN
  - secure: "" # BINTRAY_API_KEY
install:
- curl -o $HOME/.m2/settings.xml https://gist.githubusercontent.com/cryptobot/cf5fbd909c4782aaeeeb7c7f4a1a43da/raw/e60ee486e34ee0c79f89f947abe2c83b4290c6bb/settings.xml
- mvn dependency:go-offline -Pdependency-check,coverage,release
script:
- mvn clean test jacoco:report verify -Dsurefire.useFile=false -Pcoverage
after_success:
- curl -o ~/codacy-coverage-reporter-assembly-latest.jar https://oss.sonatype.org/service/local/repositories/releases/content/com/codacy/codacy-coverage-reporter/4.0.1/codacy-coverage-reporter-4.0.1-assembly.jar

cache:
  directories:
  - $HOME/.m2
deploy:
- provider: script # RELEASES
  script: mvn clean versions:set -DnewVersion=${TRAVIS_TAG} deploy -DskipTests -Prelease
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    repo: cryptomator/dokany-nio-adapter
    tags: true
after_deploy:
  - "echo '{\"close\": \"1\"}' | curl -X POST -u cryptobot:${BINTRAY_API_KEY} https://api.bintray.com/maven_central_sync/cryptomator/maven/dokany-nio-adapter/versions/${TRAVIS_TAG}"

name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Download Maven settings
        run: curl -o $HOME/.m2/settings.xml https://gist.githubusercontent.com/cryptobot/cf5fbd909c4782aaeeeb7c7f4a1a43da/raw/e60ee486e34ee0c79f89f947abe2c83b4290c6bb/settings.xml
      - name: Download dependencies
        run: mvn dependency:go-offline -Pdependency-check,coverage,release
      - name: Build and test
        run: mvn clean test jacoco:report verify -Dsurefire.useFile=false -Pcoverage
      - name: Download Codacy coverage reporter
        run: curl -o ~/codacy-coverage-reporter-assembly-latest.jar https://oss.sonatype.org/service/local/repositories/releases/content/com/codacy/codacy-coverage-reporter/4.0.1/codacy-coverage-reporter-4.0.1-assembly.jar
      - name: Upload coverage to Codacy
        run: $JAVA_HOME/bin/java -jar ~/codacy-coverage-reporter-assembly-latest.jar report -l Java -r target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
        env:
          CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN }}
      - name: Deploy release
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        run: mvn clean versions:set -DnewVersion=${{ github.ref_name }} deploy -DskipTests -Prelease
      - name: Sync to Maven Central
        if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
        run: echo '{"close": "1"}' | curl -X POST -u cryptobot:${{ secrets.BINTRAY_API_KEY }} https://api.bintray.com/maven_central_sync/cryptomator/maven/dokany-nio-adapter/versions/${{ github.ref_name }}

input:
language: java

dist: trusty

sudo: false   # Linux OS: run in container

env:
  global:
    # get all the branches referencing this commit
    - TAG_BRANCH=$(git ls-remote origin | sed -n "\|$TRAVIS_COMMIT\s\+refs/heads/|{s///p}")


jdk: oraclejdk12

addons:
  apt:
    packages:
      - p7zip-full

before_install:
  - if [[ "${TRAVIS_OS_NAME}" == linux ]]; then export DISPLAY=:99.0; sh -e /etc/init.d/xvfb start; fi

install: true

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.m2

script: mvn package -q

after_success:
  - chmod +x .github/deploy_prepare.sh
  - chmod +x .github/deploy_bintray_central.sh

deploy:
  - provider: script
    script: .github/deploy_prepare.sh
    skip_cleanup: true
    on: &on
      repo: $TRAVIS_REPO_SLUG
      tags: true
      all_branches: true
      condition: $TAG_BRANCH =~ ^(master|master-11)$
  - provider: releases
    api_key: $GITHUB_TOKEN
    file_glob: true
    file:
      - javadoc.zip
      - /**/target/*.jar
    skip_cleanup: true
    name: Release $TRAVIS_TAG
    body: See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/$TRAVIS_REPO_SLUG/blob/$TAG_BRANCH/CHANGELOG.md)
    on: *on
  - provider: script
    script: .github/deploy_bintray_central.sh
    skip_cleanup: true
    on: *on
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  MAVEN_OPTS: -Xmx2500m

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 12
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '12'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Install p7zip
        run: sudo apt-get install -y p7zip-full
      - name: Setup display for Linux
        run: |
          export DISPLAY=:99.0
          sudo /etc/init.d/xvfb start || true
      - name: Build package
        run: mvn package -q

  deploy-prepare:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') && (contains(github.ref, 'master') || contains(github.ref, 'master-11'))
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 12
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '12'
      - name: Prepare deployment
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/deploy_prepare.sh
          .github/deploy_prepare.sh

  deploy-github-release:
    needs: deploy-prepare
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') && (contains(github.ref, 'master') || contains(github.ref, 'master-11'))
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 12
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '12'
      - name: Build artifacts
        run: mvn package -q
      - name: Get tag branch
        id: get_branch
        run: |
          TAG_BRANCH=$(git ls-remote origin | sed -n "\|${{ github.sha }}\s\+refs/heads/|{s///p}")
          echo "tag_branch=$TAG_BRANCH" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Releases
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          gh release create ${{ github.ref_name }} \
            --title "Release ${{ github.ref_name }}" \
            --notes "See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/blob/${{ steps.get_branch.outputs.tag_branch }}/CHANGELOG.md)" \
            javadoc.zip \
            **/target/*.jar

  deploy-bintray-central:
    needs: deploy-github-release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') && (contains(github.ref, 'master') || contains(github.ref, 'master-11'))
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 12
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '12'
      - name: Deploy to Bintray and Central
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/deploy_bintray_central.sh
          .github/deploy_bintray_central.sh

env:
  - FEDORA=27
  - FEDORA=28

install:
  - docker pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:$FEDORA
  - docker run
      --name=container
      --detach
      -i
      -v $(pwd):/root/jss
      registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:$FEDORA
  - docker exec container dnf install -y dnf-plugins-core gcc make rpm-build
  - docker exec container dnf copr -y enable @pki/10.6

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        FEDORA: [27, 28]
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Install
      run: |
        docker pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:${{ matrix.FEDORA }}
        docker run --name=container --detach -i -v $(pwd):/root/jss registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:${{ matrix.FEDORA }}

        docker exec container /root/jss/build.sh --with-timestamp --with-commit-id rpm

    - name: Script
      run: docker exec container rpm -Uvh /root/build/jss/RPMS/*

input:
language: java

branches:
  only:
    - master
    #tag xx.yy-zz or xx.yy.zz-anythinglikeexperimental
    - /^\d+\.\d+(\.\d+)?(-\S*)?$/
    #hotfix branches (not being too strict on purpose)
    - /^hf-.*$/

script:
  - mvn test -B
  - mvn pitmp:run

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

deploy:
  provider: script
  script: deploy/deploy.sh
  on:
    tags: true
output:
name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - 'hf-*'
    tags:
      - '*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Test
      run: mvn test -B

    - name: PIT
      run: mvn pitmp:run

    - name: After success
      run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

    - name: Deploy
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
      run: deploy/deploy.sh

input:
language: android
sudo: required
jdk: openjdk8

notifications:
  email: false

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
    - $HOME/.android/build-cache

android:
  components:
  - tools
  - platform-tools
  - build-tools-28.0.3
  - android-28
  - extra-google-m2repository
  - extra-android-m2repository
  licenses:
  - android-sdk-preview-license-.+
  - android-sdk-license-.+
  - google-gdk-license-.+

before_install:
- yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-28"

script:
- ./gradlew clean build --stacktrace

before_deploy:
- openssl aes-256-cbc -K $encrypted_f6e0f94759d3_key -iv $encrypted_f6e0f94759d3_iv
  -in gotify-release-key.jks.enc -out gotify-release-key.jks -d
- cp $TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR/gotify-release-key.jks $HOME
- cd app/build/outputs/apk/release
- jarsigner -verbose -sigalg SHA1withRSA -digestalg SHA1 -keystore $HOME/gotify-release-key.jks
  -storepass $STOREPASS -keypass $KEYPASS app-release-unsigned.apk gotify-release-key
- jarsigner -verify app-release-unsigned.apk
- "${ANDROID_HOME}/build-tools/28.0.3/zipalign -v 4 app-release-unsigned.apk Gotify.apk"

deploy:
  provider: releases
  file: Gotify.apk
  api_key: $GH_TOKEN
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    repo: gotify/android
    tags: true
    jdk: openjdk8
output:
name: Android CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR: ${{ github.workspace }}

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Install Android SDK
      uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3

    - name: Install Android components
      run: |
        sdkmanager "tools" "platform-tools" "build-tools;28.0.3" "platforms;android-28" "extras;google;m2repository" "extras;android;m2repository"
        yes | sdkmanager --licenses

    - name: Before install
      run: yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-28"

    - name: Build
      run: ./gradlew clean build --stacktrace

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

    - name: Decrypt and sign APK
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') && github.repository == 'gotify/android'
      run: |
        openssl aes-256-cbc -K $encrypted_f6e0f94759d3_key -iv $encrypted_f6e0f94759d3_iv -in gotify-release-key.jks.enc -out gotify-release-key.jks -d
        cp $TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR/gotify-release-key.jks $HOME
        cd app/build/outputs/apk/release
        jarsigner -verbose -sigalg SHA1withRSA -digestalg SHA1 -keystore $HOME/gotify-release-key.jks -storepass $STOREPASS -keypass $KEYPASS app-release-unsigned.apk gotify-release-key
        jarsigner -verify app-release-unsigned.apk
        "${ANDROID_HOME}/build-tools/28.0.3/zipalign" -v 4 app-release-unsigned.apk Gotify.apk

    - name: Release
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') && github.repository == 'gotify/android'
      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
      with:
        files: app/build/outputs/apk/release/Gotify.apk
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GH_TOKEN }}

input:
language: java
jdk:
  - oraclejdk8
  - oraclejdk7
  - openjdk7
script:
  - ./gradlew check
before_deploy: "./gradlew assembleDist"
sudo: false
deploy:
  provider: releases
  api_key:
    secure: F/phrNZC+kF8IyHEDyJtQA9P72FBLLUyuWDVn9QvBedhveGRbBkXDx/mpLD5iuir8+fK1Inm+09BMfpX+UoEcS8a6mgbEGqqUX61ZIUpGmXASw0EJbX/Bne7oMrvm4IHYIaRord2+YyGeUOdzCggwoh/wnFlLcL5Q97xyN5N4Ig=
  file:
    - build/distributions/ical4j-$RELEASE_VERSION.zip
    - build/distributions/ical4j-$RELEASE_VERSION.tar.gz
  skip_cleanup: true
  on:
    tags: true
after_script:
  - sudo keytool -import -alias sonar -keystore $JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security/cacerts -file sonar_cert.pem -storepass changeit -noprompt
  # Check if commit is not a pull request, if git repo is official, and if branch is master. If checks pass, run Sonar reports
  - "[[ $TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST == false ]] && [[ $TRAVIS_REPO_SLUG == ical4j/ical4j-connector ]] && [[ $TRAVIS_BRANCH == master ]] && ./gradlew sonarqube"
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    strategy:
      matrix:
        java: ['8', '7']
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.java }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}
      - name: Run check
        run: ./gradlew check
      - name: Import Sonar certificate
        if: always()
        run: sudo keytool -import -alias sonar -keystore $JAVA_HOME/lib/security/cacerts -file sonar_cert.pem -storepass changeit -noprompt
      - name: Run SonarQube analysis
        if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.repository == 'ical4j/ical4j-connector' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && matrix.java == '8'
        run: ./gradlew sonarqube

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Assemble distribution
        run: ./gradlew assembleDist
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Releases
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          RELEASE_VERSION: ${{ github.ref_name }}
        run: |
          gh release upload ${{ github.ref_name }} build/distributions/ical4j-$RELEASE_VERSION.zip build/distributions/ical4j-$RELEASE_VERSION.tar.gz

    - name: "Coverage"

        - ./gradlew --scan --stacktrace --warning-mode=all -PenableJaCoCo build jacocoRootReport

    - stage: deploy

      script: ./gradlew --scan publish -x check
    - name: "Update snapshot documentation"
      addons:
        apt:
          packages:
            - graphviz
      env:
        # GRGIT_USER
        - secure: PwwKcsVdukfzvDBHmdajhMsIVHSbPt+lorgibpRXImBt+C4XHlaz/Z78Bq8jtkDvrXb+DTSfSGvAxg1IBM+rtCzrYb5DAqq+OfuG9Uu6FDTnkIOHs5Gii7pAfT0+W31Oj76OgiCAXX+p8lbFTchz6ope5zVYEpSlAe7aXCVTGM0=

name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches-ignore: [ 'r[0-9]*' ]
  pull_request:
    branches-ignore: [ 'r[0-9]*' ]

jobs:
  build:
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            java: '11'
          - os: macos-latest
            java: '11'
          - os: ubuntu-latest
            java: 'ea'
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    continue-on-error: ${{ matrix.java == 'ea' }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: ${{ matrix.java }}
    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/modules-2
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/dists
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ matrix.java }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ matrix.java }}-
    - name: Install
      run: ./gradlew --version
    - name: Build
      run: ./gradlew --scan --warning-mode=all -Dplatform.tooling.support.tests.enabled=true build
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/*.lock

  coverage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/modules-2
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/dists
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-11-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-11-
    - name: Build with coverage
      run: ./gradlew --scan --stacktrace --warning-mode=all -PenableJaCoCo build jacocoRootReport
    - name: Upload coverage
      run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/*.lock

  deploy:
    if: github.repository == 'junit-team/junit5' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Publish snapshot artifacts
      run: ./gradlew --scan publish -x check

  update_snapshot_documentation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
    - name: Install graphviz
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y graphviz
    - name: Update snapshot documentation
      run: ./src/publishDocumentationSnapshotOnlyIfNecessary.sh

input:
language: java
jdk:
  - openjdk7 # not really openjdk7 - we're just using this travis placeholder for our own Oracle JDK 7 installation
  - oraclejdk8
  - oraclejdk9
  - openjdk10

before_install:
  - echo "TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION is ${TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION}"
  - |
    if [[ "${TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION}" == "openjdk7" ]]; then
      
      export MAVEN_OPTS="-Dhttps.protocols=TLSv1.2 -Xmx512m -XX:MaxPermSize=128m"
      export JAVA_HOME="/usr/lib/jvm/java-7-oracle" # Set JAVA_HOME to where we want to install Oracle JDK 7
      export PATH="${JAVA_HOME}/bin:${PATH}"
      
      if [[ ! -d "${JAVA_HOME}" ]]; then
        # Download and install Oracle JDK 7:
        wget https://s3.amazonaws.com/d2fbee19-5fe2-425f-ae11-cd25b35dc99a/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz
        tar xvfz /tmp/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz -C /tmp
        sudo mv /tmp/jdk1.7.0_80 "${JAVA_HOME}"
      fi
      
      # Download and install JCE Unlimited Strength Crypto policies for Oracle JDK 7:
      curl -q -L -C - https://238dj3282as03k369.s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip -o /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip
      sudo unzip -oj -d "$JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security" /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip \*/\*.jar
      rm /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip
    fi
  # If on JDK 8, ensure build coverage assertions are run (we only need to run this on one JDK to reduce overall build times):
  - export BUILD_COVERAGE="$([ $TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION == 'oraclejdk8' ] && echo 'true')"

install: true

script:
  - mvn install
  - test -z "$BUILD_COVERAGE" || { mvn clean clover:setup test && mvn -pl . clover:clover clover:check coveralls:report; }
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: [openjdk7, oraclejdk8, oraclejdk9, openjdk10]

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Echo JDK version
      run: echo "TRAVIS_JDK_VERSION is ${{ matrix.jdk }}"

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      if: matrix.jdk == 'oraclejdk8'
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Set up JDK 9
      if: matrix.jdk == 'oraclejdk9'
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '9'

    - name: Set up JDK 10
      if: matrix.jdk == 'openjdk10'
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '10'

    - name: Install Oracle JDK 7
      if: matrix.jdk == 'openjdk7'
      run: |
        export MAVEN_OPTS="-Dhttps.protocols=TLSv1.2 -Xmx512m -XX:MaxPermSize=128m"
        export JAVA_HOME="/usr/lib/jvm/java-7-oracle"
        export PATH="${JAVA_HOME}/bin:${PATH}"
        if [[ ! -d "${JAVA_HOME}" ]]; then
          wget https://s3.amazonaws.com/d2fbee19-5fe2-425f-ae11-cd25b35dc99a/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz -O /tmp/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz
          tar xvfz /tmp/jdk-7u80-linux-x64.tar.gz -C /tmp
          sudo mv /tmp/jdk1.7.0_80 "${JAVA_HOME}"
        fi
        curl -q -L -C - https://238dj3282as03k369.s3-us-west-1.amazonaws.com/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip -o /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip
        sudo unzip -oj -d "$JAVA_HOME/jre/lib/security" /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip \*/\*.jar
        rm /tmp/UnlimitedJCEPolicyJDK7.zip

    - name: Install
      run: /bin/true

    - name: Build
      run: mvn install

    - name: Coverage
      if: matrix.jdk == 'oraclejdk8'
      run: |
        mvn clean clover:setup test
        mvn -pl . clover:clover clover:check coveralls:report

input:
language: java

jdk:
  - oraclejdk8

services:
  - docker

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/
    - $HOME/libsodium

install:
  - ./travis-install-libsodium.sh
  - export PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib/pkgconfig:$PKG_CONFIG_PATH
  - export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH

stages:
  - name: build
  - name: snapshot
    if: branch = dev
  - name: release
    if: branch = master

jobs:
  include:
    # run gradle build
    - stage: build
      script:
        - docker-compose up -d
        - ./gradlew integrationTest
        - ./gradlew build

    # publish snapshot to oss.jfrog.org
    - stage: snapshot
      script: ./gradlew artifactoryPublish -x test -Dsnapshot=true -Dbintray.user=$BINTRAY_USER -Dbintray.key=$BINTRAY_KEY -Dbuild.number=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    # release a new stable version to bintray
    - stage: release
      script:
       - ./gradlew bintrayUpload -x test -Dbintray.user=$BINTRAY_USER -Dbintray.key=$BINTRAY_KEY -Dbuild.number=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER
      before_deploy:
        - VERSION=`./gradlew -q pV`
        - TAG="v$VERSION"
        - git config --global user.name "Travis CI"
        - git config --global user.email "builds@travis-ci.com"
        - git tag $TAG
      deploy:
        provider: releases
        api_key:
          secure: $GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN
        body: "Please take a look into the [release notes](https://github.com/kryptokrauts/aepp-sdk-java/blob/${TAG}/docs/release-notes/RELEASE-NOTES-${VERSION}.md) for more information about the recent changes."
        skip_cleanup: true
        file_glob: true
        file:
          - build/libs/*.jar
        on: master
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          $HOME/libsodium
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-libsodium-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', 'travis-install-libsodium.sh') }}

    - name: Install
      run: |
        ./travis-install-libsodium.sh
        echo "PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib/pkgconfig:$PKG_CONFIG_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Build
      run: |
        docker-compose up -d
        ./gradlew integrationTest
        ./gradlew build

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  snapshot:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/dev' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          $HOME/libsodium
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-libsodium-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', 'travis-install-libsodium.sh') }}

    - name: Install
      run: |
        ./travis-install-libsodium.sh
        echo "PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib/pkgconfig:$PKG_CONFIG_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Publish snapshot
      run: ./gradlew artifactoryPublish -x test -Dsnapshot=true -Dbintray.user=$BINTRAY_USER -Dbintray.key=$BINTRAY_KEY -Dbuild.number=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  release:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Cache
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          $HOME/libsodium
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-libsodium-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', 'travis-install-libsodium.sh') }}

    - name: Install
      run: |
        ./travis-install-libsodium.sh
        echo "PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib/pkgconfig:$PKG_CONFIG_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV
        echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$HOME/libsodium/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH" >> $GITHUB_ENV

    - name: Release build
      run: ./gradlew bintrayUpload -x test -Dbintray.user=$BINTRAY_USER -Dbintray.key=$BINTRAY_KEY -Dbuild.number=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    - name: Compute tag
      id: vars
      run: |
        VERSION=$(./gradlew -q pV)
        echo "version=$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        echo "tag=v$VERSION" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

    - name: Configure git and tag
      run: |
        git config --global user.name "Travis CI"
        git config --global user.email "builds@travis-ci.com"
        git tag ${{ steps.vars.outputs.tag }}

    - name: Create release
      uses: actions/create-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ steps.vars.outputs.tag }}
        release_name: ${{ steps.vars.outputs.tag }}
        body: "Please take a look into the [release notes](https://github.com/kryptokrauts/aepp-sdk-java/blob/${{ steps.vars.outputs.tag }}/docs/release-notes/RELEASE-NOTES-${{ steps.vars.outputs.version }}.md) for more information about the recent changes."
        draft: false
        prerelease: false

    - name: Upload release assets
      uses: actions/upload-release-asset@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
      with:
        upload_url: ${{ steps.create-release.outputs.upload_url }}
        asset_path: build/libs/
        asset_name: "*.jar"
        asset_content_type: application/java-archive

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

input:
sudo: false
language: android

jdk: oraclejdk8

notifications:
  email: false



android:
    components:
      - tools
      - platform-tools
      - build-tools-26.0.2
      - android-23
      - extra-android-support
      - extra-android-m2repository
      - extra-google-m2repository
      - extra-android-m2repository
      - extra-google-google_play_services

before_cache:
  # Do not cache a few Gradle files/directories (see https://docs.travis-ci.com/user/languages/java/#Caching)
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    # Android SDK
    - $HOME/android-sdk-dl
    - $HOME/android-sdk

    # Gradle dependencies
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

    # Android build cache (see http://tools.android.com/tech-docs/build-cache)
    - $HOME/.android/build-cache

before_install:
  - ./gradlew --version


before_script:
  - echo '"Build..."' && echo -en 'travis_fold:start:script.build\\r'
  - ./gradlew assembleDebugUnitTest -Dpre-dex=false
  - echo -en 'travis_fold:end:script.build\\r'

script:
  # skips predex on travis, takes too long, too much memory
  ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest -Dpre-dex=false -q
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "tools" "platform-tools"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;26.0.2"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-23"
          sdkmanager "extras;android;m2repository"
          sdkmanager "extras;google;m2repository"
          sdkmanager "extras;google;google_play_services"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/android-sdk-dl
            ~/android-sdk
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
            ~/.android/build-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Check Gradle version
        run: ./gradlew --version
      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Build..."
          ./gradlew assembleDebugUnitTest -Dpre-dex=false
      - name: Run tests
        run: ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest -Dpre-dex=false -q
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

    project:

      with:

        java-version: '8'

    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

        java-version: '8'

    - name: Prepend build command

    - name: Coverity build
      run: ./gradlew build

    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: check
      script: ./gradlew check
    - stage: publish
      script: ./gradlew build publish
      on:
        branch: master

stages:
  - check
  - name: publish
    if: env(ACCESS_KEY)
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run check
        run: ./gradlew check
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  publish:
    needs: check
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && vars.ACCESS_KEY != ''
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Build and publish
        run: ./gradlew build publish
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

input:
sudo: required
dist: xenial
language: java
cache:
  directories:
  - "$HOME/.m2"
  - frontend/node
  - frontend/node_modules
jdk: openjdk13
services:
  - docker
before_install:
  - sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y chromium-browser
  - openssl aes-256-cbc -K $encrypted_7051ac01cf89_key -iv $encrypted_7051ac01cf89_iv -in ./.travis/id_rsa.enc -out ~/.ssh/id_rsa -d
  - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
  - java -version;
    echo $JAVA_HOME;
install: "/bin/true" # workaround https://github.com/Swagger2Markup/swagger2markup-maven-plugin/pull/24
before_script:
after_acript:
script:
  - (cd docker; docker-compose up -d)
  # if there isn't pointed explicitly Chrome will be used by default for both webdriver integration test and js unit test
  # We use 'install' phase because of use jars in subsequent tests
  - DATE_VERSION=`date +%Y%m%d.%H.%M`
  - "rm ~/.m2/settings.xml"
  - ./mvnw -U -q -Drevision=$DATE_VERSION -P frontend -P jacoco -P docker -P webdriver-chrome -P webdriver-firefox -Dcustom.selenium.headless=true clean install
  - (cd docker; docker-compose down)
  - ./mvnw -U -q -Drevision=$DATE_VERSION -pl deploy-test -P deploy-test clean test
  - rm -rf ~/.m2/repository/com/github/nkonev/blog
  - rm -rf $TRAVIS_BUILD_DIR/frontend/node_modules/.cache
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
  - if [[ "$TRAVIS_BRANCH" == "master" && "$TRAVIS_TEST_RESULT" == "0" && "$TRAVIS_EVENT_TYPE" != "cron" ]]; then (
      echo "Will push docker image";
      docker login -u="$DOCKER_LOGIN" -p="$DOCKER_PASSWORD";
      docker push nkonev/blog:latest;
      ssh -o "BatchMode yes" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -q $CONNECT_LINE $UPDATE_COMMAND;
    ) else (
      echo "Won't push docker image and deploy";
    ) fi
addons:
  firefox: "63.0"
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  DATE_VERSION: ${{ github.run_number }}

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 13
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '13'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.m2
            frontend/node
            frontend/node_modules
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}-node-${{ hashFiles('frontend/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Install Chromium
        run: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y chromium-browser
      - name: Setup Firefox
        uses: browser-actions/setup-firefox@v1
        with:
          firefox-version: '63.0'
      - name: Decrypt SSH key
        run: |
          openssl aes-256-cbc -K ${{ secrets.ENCRYPTED_7051AC01CF89_KEY }} -iv ${{ secrets.ENCRYPTED_7051AC01CF89_IV }} -in ./.travis/id_rsa.enc -out ~/.ssh/id_rsa -d
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
      - name: Check Java version
        run: |
          java -version
          echo $JAVA_HOME
      - name: Start Docker Compose services
        run: (cd docker; docker-compose up -d)
      - name: Set version
        run: echo "DATE_VERSION=$(date +%Y%m%d.%H.%M)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
      - name: Remove Maven settings
        run: rm ~/.m2/settings.xml || true
      - name: Build and test
        run: ./mvnw -U -q -Drevision=$DATE_VERSION -P frontend -P jacoco -P docker -P webdriver-chrome -P webdriver-firefox -Dcustom.selenium.headless=true clean install
      - name: Stop Docker Compose services
        run: (cd docker; docker-compose down)
      - name: Run deploy tests
        run: ./mvnw -U -q -Drevision=$DATE_VERSION -pl deploy-test -P deploy-test clean test
      - name: Cleanup
        run: |
          rm -rf ~/.m2/repository/com/github/nkonev/blog
          rm -rf $GITHUB_WORKSPACE/frontend/node_modules/.cache
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
      - name: Push Docker image and deploy
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && success() && github.event_name != 'schedule'
        run: |
          echo "Will push docker image"
          echo "${{ secrets.DOCKER_PASSWORD }}" | docker login -u "${{ secrets.DOCKER_LOGIN }}" --password-stdin
          docker push nkonev/blog:latest
          ssh -o "BatchMode yes" -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -q ${{ secrets.CONNECT_LINE }} ${{ secrets.UPDATE_COMMAND }}

        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run tests and generate coverage
        run: cd $TEST_DIR && gradle jacocoTestReport
      - name: Generate additional coverage report
        run: if [ -e ./gradlew ]; then ./gradlew jacocoTestReport;else gradle jacocoTestReport;fi
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t uuid-repo-token
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |

name: Java CI

        include:

            RUNTIME: ol

          - java-version: 8
            RUNTIME: ol
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.3

            RUNTIME: wlp

            RUNTIME: wlp
            RUNTIME_VERSION: 19.0.0.3

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'

branches:
  only:
    - master
    - /^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/ # regex

language: android

  - oraclejdk8

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'
      - name: Install codecov
        run: pip install codecov
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Accept Android SDK licenses
        run: |
          mkdir "$ANDROID_HOME/licenses" || true
          echo "24333f8a63b6825ea9c5514f83c2829b004d1fee" >> "$ANDROID_HOME/licenses/android-sdk-license"
      - name: Cache Gradle and Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle
            ~/.m2/repository
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-maven-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties', '**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-maven-
      - name: Run tests and generate coverage
        run: ./gradlew clean testDebugUnitTest jacocoTestReport
      - name: Upload coverage to Coveralls
        run: ./gradlew coveralls
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: codecov

  - openjdk8
os:
  - linux

  - chmod +x gradlew
  - ./gradlew wrapper --gradle-version 4.8.1
  - echo $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER > $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER/src/main/resources/build.txt
before_deploy:
  - git config --local user.name "PepperLola"
  - git config --local user.email "$GIT_EMAIL"
  - git tag -a $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER -m "Automated beta build."
  - git push https://$GIT_TOKEN@github.com/PepperLola/playerinfo.git HEAD:master --follow-tags

  api_key: $GIT_TOKEN

name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    if: "!startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')"
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Before install
      run: |
        chmod +x gradlew
        ./gradlew wrapper --gradle-version 4.8.1
        echo $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER > $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER/src/main/resources/build.txt

    - name: Script
      run: |
        chmod +x gradlew
        ./gradlew :test

    - name: Before deploy
      run: |
        git config --local user.name "PepperLola"
        git config --local user.email "$GIT_EMAIL"
        git tag -a $TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER -m "Automated beta build."
        git push https://$GIT_TOKEN@github.com/PepperLola/playerinfo.git HEAD:master --follow-tags

    - name: Deploy
      if: github.repository == 'PepperLola/playerinfo'
      uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ env.TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER }}
        files: ${{ github.workspace }}/build/libs/*
        prerelease: true

          yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-26"

        uses: actions/cache@v4

language: java

env:
  global:
  - SMALLD_VERSION="$(git describe --dirty --tags)-SNAPSHOT"
  - MAVEN_OPTS="-Drevision=$SMALLD_VERSION -Dproperty=revision -DnewVersion=$SMALLD_VERSION -DgenerateBackupPoms=false"

addons:
  sonarcloud:
    organization: "ianagbip1oti-github"

before_install:
- 'if [ "$TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST" = "false" ]; then bash ./etc/extract_secrets.sh; fi'

stages:
- build
- name: release
  if: tag =~ ^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$
  
jobs:
  include:
    - stage: build
      jdk: oraclejdk8
      script: mvn -B verify
    - jdk: oraclejdk9
      script: mvn -B verify
    - jdk: openjdk8
      script: mvn -B verify
    - stage: release
      jdk: openjdk8
      env:
        - SMALLD_VERSION=$(git describe --dirty --tags)
        - MAVEN_OPTS="-Drevision=$SMALLD_VERSION -Dproperty=revision -DnewVersion=$SMALLD_VERSION -DgenerateBackupPoms=false"
      script: mvn -s etc/settings.xml -B versions:set-property deploy -P release
output:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  MAVEN_OPTS: -Drevision=${{ github.ref_name }}-SNAPSHOT -Dproperty=revision -DnewVersion=${{ github.ref_name }}-SNAPSHOT -DgenerateBackupPoms=false

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        jdk: ['8', '9']
        include:
          - jdk: '8'
            distribution: temurin
          - jdk: '9'
            distribution: temurin
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: ${{ matrix.distribution }}
          java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      - name: Extract secrets
        if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
        run: bash ./etc/extract_secrets.sh
      - name: Build and verify
        run: mvn -B verify
      - name: Run SonarCloud analysis
        if: matrix.jdk == '8'
        run: mvn -B sonar:sonar
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
          SONAR_ORGANIZATION: ianagbip1oti-github

  release:
    needs: build
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') && github.ref_name != '' && contains(github.ref_name, '.')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Extract secrets
        run: bash ./etc/extract_secrets.sh
      - name: Set version and deploy
        run: mvn -s etc/settings.xml -B versions:set-property deploy -P release
        env:
          MAVEN_OPTS: -Drevision=${{ github.ref_name }} -Dproperty=revision -DnewVersion=${{ github.ref_name }} -DgenerateBackupPoms=false

input:
language: android
sudo: required

before_cache:
  - rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

env:
  global:
    - COMPILE_SDK_VERSION=29 # Same as `compileSdkVersion` in build.gradle
    - EMULATOR_API=22
    - BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION=28.0.3 # Same as `buildToolsVersion` in build.gradle
    - ABI=armeabi-v7a # ARM ABI v7a by default
    - ADB_INSTALL_TIMEOUT=5 # minutes

android:
  components:
    - tools # Update android-sdk (also called android-sdk-tools)
    - platform-tools
    - tools # Write the second time to update to the newest as described in the document
    - build-tools-${BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION} # For building
    - android-${COMPILE_SDK_VERSION} # For building
    - android-${EMULATOR_API} # For testing

    - extra-android-m2repository # Support library

    - sys-img-${ABI}-android-${EMULATOR_API} # Emulator image

notifications:
  email: false

before_install:
  - chmod +x gradlew
    #- yes | sdkmanager "platforms;android-27" # Workaround from https://github.com/travis-ci/travis-ci/issues/8879

install:
  - sdkmanager --list || true
  - echo yes | sdkmanager "extras;m2repository;com;android;support;constraint;constraint-layout;1.0.2" #&> /dev/null
  - echo yes | sdkmanager "extras;m2repository;com;android;support;constraint;constraint-layout-solver;1.0.2" #&> /dev/null
  - avdmanager --list || true # See below "avdmanager"

before_script:
    #  - echo no | avdmanager create avd -n test -k android-${EMULATOR_API} -f --abi ${ABI} --tag "$TAG"
  - echo no | android create avd --force -n test -t android-${EMULATOR_API} --abi ${ABI} # avdmanager is not available (?) (see https://github.com/travis-ci/packer-templates/issues/482 )
  - emulator -avd test -no-audio -no-window &
  - android-wait-for-emulator
  - adb shell input keyevent 82 &

script:
  - ./gradlew assembleRelease
  - ./gradlew jacocoTestReport
  - ./gradlew connectedCheck

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
output:
name: Android CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      COMPILE_SDK_VERSION: 29
      EMULATOR_API: 22
      BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION: 28.0.3
      ABI: armeabi-v7a
      ADB_INSTALL_TIMEOUT: 5

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Set up Android SDK
      uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3

    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
          ~/.android/build-cache
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

    - name: Prepare Gradle
      run: chmod +x gradlew

    - name: Install Android components
      run: |
        sdkmanager --list || true
        sdkmanager "tools" "platform-tools" "build-tools;${BUILD_TOOLS_VERSION}" "platforms;android-${COMPILE_SDK_VERSION}" "platforms;android-${EMULATOR_API}" "extras;android;m2repository" "system-images;android-${EMULATOR_API};default;${ABI}"
        echo yes | sdkmanager "extras;m2repository;com;android;support;constraint;constraint-layout;1.0.2"
        echo yes | sdkmanager "extras;m2repository;com;android;support;constraint;constraint-layout-solver;1.0.2"
        avdmanager --list || true
        yes | sdkmanager --licenses

    - name: Start emulator
      run: |
        echo no | avdmanager create avd -n test -k "system-images;android-${EMULATOR_API};default;${ABI}" --abi ${ABI}
        emulator -avd test -no-audio -no-window &
        adb wait-for-device
        adb shell input keyevent 82 &

    - name: Assemble
      run: ./gradlew assembleRelease

    - name: Jacoco
      run: ./gradlew jacocoTestReport

    - name: Instrumented tests
      run: ./gradlew connectedCheck

    - name: Upload coverage
      run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: |
        rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
        rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

jobs:
  include:
    - name: jdk11

      script: ./gradlew check -i

    - name: example
      jdk: openjdk11
      before_install: |
        if .travis/build_condition.sh $TRAVIS_COMMIT_RANGE examples/example; then
          echo "Testing";
        else
          echo "NOT testing" && travis_terminate 0;
        fi
      script:
        - cd ./examples/example/
        - ./gradlew check -i
        - cd ../..

after_success:
  - bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)

  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

  only: 
    - master

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Run check
        run: ./gradlew check -i
      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
        run: bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash)
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

  example:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

        - npm install
        - npm run test
      after_failure: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log
      after_script: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid | xargs kill -9
    - stage: deploy
      name: "Deploy to Sonatype's snapshots repository"
      jdk: openjdk8
      if: type != pull_request AND env(SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME) IS present
      script: bash .travis.deploy.artifacts.sh

name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]*.[0-9]*'
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master
      - '[0-9]*.[0-9]*'

jobs:
  test_jdk8:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
    - name: Build
      run: mvn -q clean verify -B
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  test_jdk11:
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 11
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '11'
    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
    - name: Build
      run: mvn -q clean verify -B
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  apollo_link_tests:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: 'lts/*'
    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
    - name: Start Apollo tests server
      run: |
        cd vertx-web-graphql
        mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass=io.vertx.ext.web.handler.graphql.ApolloTestsServer -Dexec.classpathScope=test > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log 2>&1 &
        echo $! > ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid
        ( tail -f ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log & ) | grep -q "Apollo tests server started"
    - name: Run Apollo Link tests
      run: |
        cd tests/apollo
        npm install
        npm run test
    - name: Server log on failure
      if: failure()
      run: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.log
    - name: Stop Apollo tests server
      if: always()
      run: cat ${HOME}/ApolloTestsServer.pid | xargs kill -9
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

  deploy_snapshots:
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request' && env.SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME != ''
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.SONATYPE_NEXUS_USERNAME }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0
    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'
    - name: Cache Maven
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.m2
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
    - name: Deploy to Sonatype snapshots
      run: bash .travis.deploy.artifacts.sh
    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -rf $HOME/.m2/repository/io/vertx/

sudo: required
services:
  - docker
  - postgresql
language: java
jdk: oraclejdk8
before_script:
  - curl -L https://codeclimate.com/downloads/test-reporter/test-reporter-latest-linux-amd64 > ./cc-test-reporter
  - chmod +x ./cc-test-reporter
  - ./cc-test-reporter before-build
  - psql -c 'create database events;' -U postgres
script:
  - "./gradlew clean build jacocoTestReport jacocoFix -PbuildNumber=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER --scan"
  - docker build --no-cache --pull -t wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER .
after_success:
  - if [ "${TRAVIS_PULL_REQUEST_BRANCH:-$TRAVIS_BRANCH}" == "master" ]; then
    docker login -u="$DOCKER_USERNAME" -p="$DOCKER_PASSWORD";
    docker push wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER;
    fi
after_script:
  - cd src/main/java/
  - ../../../cc-test-reporter format-coverage -d -t jacoco
  - ../../../cc-test-reporter upload-coverage -d
notifications:
  slack: false
  email: false
output:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER: ${{ github.run_number }}
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:13
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: postgres
          POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD: trust
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd="pg_isready -U postgres"
          --health-interval=10s
          --health-timeout=5s
          --health-retries=5

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up JDK 8
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'temurin'
        java-version: '8'

    - name: Code Climate before build
      run: |
        curl -L https://codeclimate.com/downloads/test-reporter/test-reporter-latest-linux-amd64 > ./cc-test-reporter
        chmod +x ./cc-test-reporter
        ./cc-test-reporter before-build

    - name: Create database
      run: psql -c 'create database events;' -U postgres -h 127.0.0.1

    - name: Build and Docker image
      run: |
        ./gradlew clean build jacocoTestReport jacocoFix -PbuildNumber=$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER --scan
        docker build --no-cache --pull -t wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER .

    - name: Push Docker image on master
      if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/master' && github.event_name == 'push'
      run: |
        echo "$DOCKER_USERNAME" | sed 's/./*/g'
        echo "$DOCKER_PASSWORD" | docker login -u "$DOCKER_USERNAME" --password-stdin
        docker push wisvch/events:$TRAVIS_BUILD_NUMBER

    - name: Code Climate after build
      run: |
        cd src/main/java/
        ../../../cc-test-reporter format-coverage -d -t jacoco
        ../../../cc-test-reporter upload-coverage -d
